result.stderr:
Aspose.TeX Convert Micro Application 26.2.0
Copyright 2001-2025 Aspose Pty Ltd

  -i, --input         Required. The path to the input document.

  -o, --output        Required. The path for the converted document.

  -f, --format        Defines the output document format.

  -w, --width         Specifies the width of the converted document (for image
                      formats).

  -h, --height        Specifies the height of the converted document (for image
                      formats).

  -r, --resolution    Specifies the resolution of the converted document (for
                      image formats).

  -l, --license       Specifies the path to the Aspose.TeX .NET license file.

  -v, --verbose       (Default: false) Enables verbose output for detailed
                      logging.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.
